case.title: PACIFIC COAST S S CO v. BANCROFT-WHITNEY CO

opinion.h: PACIFIC COAST S S CO v. BANCROFT-WHITNEY CO, 175 U.S. 724 (1899)
PACIFIC COAST STEAMSHIP COMPANY, Petitioner, v. BANCROFT-WHITNEY COMPANY et al. No. 394.

f.p: See 36 C. C. A. 135, 94 Fed. Rep. 180.[ Pacific Coast S S Co v. Bancroft-Whitney Co 175 U.S. 724 (1899) ]
